title: EXTRACT-NOAC randomized clinical trial Dataset
author: Verhamme, Peter
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This database concerns a randomized clinical trial, called the EXTRACT-NOAC trial. The title of the trial is 'Tranexamic acid and bleeding after dental extraction in patients treated with non-vitamin K oral anticoagulants'. The aim of the trial was to evaluate the efficacy of tranexamic acid mouthwash to reduce bleeding after dental extraction in patients on non-vitamin K oral anticoagulants.
